doc_name: How Nespresso Builds Sustainability Into Its Business Model

chunks.text: Photo courtesy of Nestlé Jean-Christophe Jaunin became CEO of Nespresso North America, the Nestlé unit that sells coffee brewing machines and capsules, on Jan. 1, 2026, after having served as global chief customer and technology officer. At the NYU Stern Center for Sustainable Business’s annual practice forum in March, MIT Sloan Management Review spoke with […]
